name: Occult Cloak
description: Long ago, Brynn was a gathering spot for a secret cult of sanguimancers, coveting the secrets of vampirism. It's unknown whether they were successful with their experiments, but they surely met their demise as it befits vampires - with wooden stakes deep in their chests.
descriptionZh: 很久以前，有个研习血魔法的地下教派经常在布林聚集，希望获得吸血的能力。尽管不知道这些人的实验最终成功没有，但他们的下场和吸血鬼相同——全都是胸口插进了木桩。
